obtain ⟨M, hM_pos, hM_ε⟩ : ∃ M : ℕ, 0 < M ∧ Real.log (1 - 1 / M : ℝ)⁻¹ < ε / 3 := sorry
  let L := M * M
  have hL_pos : L > 0 := by positivity
  filter_upwards [eventually_ge_atTop (L * L + 1),
    eventually_atTop.mpr ⟨1, fun n _ ↦ Real.log n < ε / 3 * n⟩] with n hn h_log
  let P : Params := ⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn⟩
  use P, rfl
  have h_waste := P.initial.waste.trans (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right hM_ε.le (cast_nonneg n))
  have h_sum : ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow,
    if P.initial.balance p > 0 then (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) * Real.log p
    else if p ≤ L then (-P.initial.balance p : ℝ) * Real.log L
    else (-P.initial.balance p : ℝ) * Real.log (n / p) ≤ ε / 3 * n := sorry
  unfold Factorization.score
  split_ifs <;> linarith

obtain ⟨M, hM_pos, hM_waste⟩ : ∃ M : ℕ, M > 1 ∧ Real.log (1 - 1 / (M : ℝ))⁻¹ < ε / 2 := by
    have h_lim : Tendsto (fun M : ℕ ↦ Real.log (1 - 1 / (M : ℝ))⁻¹) atTop (nhds 0) := by
      rw [← Real.log_one]; refine Tendsto.log ?_ (by norm_num)
      rw [← inv_one]; refine Tendsto.inv ?_ (by norm_num)
      simp only [sub_zero]; exact tendsto_one_sub_inv
    obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := (h_lim.eventually (lt_mem_nhds (half_pos hε))).exists
    exact ⟨M + 2, by positivity, sorry⟩
  set L := M ^ 2
  filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop (L ^ 2)] with n hn
  let P : Params := ⟨n, M, L, by positivity, hn⟩
  use P, rfl
  unfold Factorization.score
  have h_waste : P.initial.waste ≤ ε / 2 * n := P.initial.waste.trans (by sorry)
  have h_sum : (if P.initial.total_imbalance > 0 then Real.log n else 0) +
    ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow, (if P.initial.balance p > 0 then (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) * Real.log p
    else if p ≤ L then (-P.initial.balance p : ℝ) * Real.log L
    else (-P.initial.balance p : ℝ) * Real.log (n / p)) ≤ ε / 2 * n := by sorry
  linarith

let M := ⌈4 / ε⌉₊
  let L := ⌈12 * (M : ℝ) / ε⌉₊
  have hLp : L > 0 := Nat.ceil_pos.mpr (by positivity)
  filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop (L * L), eventually_gt_atTop 1] with n hn hn'
  set P : Params := ⟨n, M, L, hLp, hn⟩
  use P, rfl
  have h_waste := P.initial.waste
  have h_large_le := fun {p} (hp : p > n / L) ↦ P.initial.balance_large_prime_le hp
  have h_large_ge := fun {p} (hp : p > n / L) ↦ P.initial.balance_large_prime_ge hp
  have h_med_le := fun {p} (hp : p > Real.sqrt n) ↦ P.initial.balance_medium_prime_le hp
  have h_med_ge := fun {p} (hp : p ≤ n / L) (hp' : p > Real.sqrt n) ↦ P.initial.balance_medium_prime_ge hp hp'
  have h_small_le := fun {p} (hp : p ≤ Real.sqrt n) ↦ P.initial.balance_small_prime_le hp
  have h_small_ge := fun {p} (hp : p ≤ Real.sqrt n) (hp' : p > L) ↦ P.initial.balance_small_prime_ge hp hp'
  have h_tiny_ge := fun {p} (hp : p ≤ L) ↦ P.initial.balance_tiny_prime_ge hp
  sorry

  filter_upwards [Filter.eventually_gt_atTop (L * L), (by sorry : ∀ᶠ n : ℕ in Filter.atTop, Real.log n ≤ ε * n / 4)] with n hn hlog
  use ⟨n, M, L, by positivity, hn⟩, rfl
  unfold Factorization.score
  linarith [Params.initial.waste ⟨n, M, L, by positivity, hn⟩,
    (by split_ifs <;> linarith : (if _ > 0 then Real.log n else 0) ≤ ε * n / 4),
    (by sorry : ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow, (if Factorization.balance P.initial p > 0 then (Factorization.balance P.initial p : ℝ) * Real.log p else if p ≤ L then (-Factorization.balance P.initial p : ℝ) * Real.log L else (-Factorization.balance P.initial p : ℝ) * Real.log (n / p)) ≤ ε * n / 2)]

let M := ⌈12 / ε⌉₊ + 1
  let L := M ^ 2
  have hL_pos : L > 0 := by positivity
  filter_upwards [Filter.eventually_gt_atTop (L ^ 2)] with n hn
  let P : Params := ⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn⟩
  refine ⟨P, rfl, ?_⟩
  calc P.initial.score L
    _ ≤ P.initial.waste + log n + ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow,
        if P.initial.balance p > 0 then (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) * log p
        else if p ≤ L then (-P.initial.balance p : ℝ) * log L
        else (-P.initial.balance p : ℝ) * log (n / p) := by
      unfold Factorization.score; split_ifs <;>
      linarith [Real.log_nonneg (show (1 : ℝ) ≤ n by exact_mod_cast (by linarith [P.hL, P.hL_pos] : 1 ≤ n))]
    _ ≤ ε * n := sorry

let M := ⌈4 / ε⌉₊ + 1
  let L := M * M
  have hL : L > 0 := by dsimp [L]; positivity
  filter_upwards [eventually_ge_atTop (L * L + 1)] with n hn
  let P : Params := ⟨n, M, L, hL, by nlinarith⟩
  refine ⟨P, rfl, ?_⟩
  unfold Factorization.score
  have h_waste := P.initial.waste
  have hB_large_le := @initial.balance_large_prime_le P
  have hB_large_ge := @initial.balance_large_prime_ge P
  have hB_med_le := @initial.balance_medium_prime_le P
  have hB_med_ge := @initial.balance_medium_prime_ge P
  have hB_small_le := @initial.balance_small_prime_le P
  have hB_small_ge := @initial.balance_small_prime_ge P
  have hB_tiny_ge := @initial.balance_tiny_prime_ge P
  -- The score is bounded by waste + penalty + sum_over_primes.
  -- As n → ∞, waste is approx n/M, and all other terms are o(n) or smaller.
  -- By picking M large enough, the total score is eventually bounded by εn.
  sorry

let M := ⌈4 / ε⌉₊
  let L := M ^ 2
  have hM : 0 < M := Nat.ceil_pos.mpr (by positivity)
  have hL_pos : 0 < L := pow_pos hM 2
  filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop (L * L)] with n hn
  let P : Params := ⟨n, M, L, hL_pos, hn⟩
  use P, rfl
  have h_waste := P.initial.waste
  have h_score_est : P.initial.score L ≤ P.initial.waste + Real.log n + ε / 2 * n := sorry
  calc P.initial.score L
    _ ≤ P.initial.waste + Real.log n + ε / 2 * n := h_score_est
    _ ≤ n * Real.log (1 - 1 / M : ℝ)⁻¹ + Real.log n + ε / 2 * n := by linarith [h_waste]
    _ ≤ ε * n := sorry

rw [Filter.eventually_atTop]
  obtain ⟨n₀, hn₀⟩ : ∃ n₀, ∀ n ≥ n₀, ∃ M L : ℕ, ∃ hLp : 0 < L, ∃ hL : n > L * L,
    (Params.initial ⟨n, M, L, hLp, hL⟩).score L ≤ ε * n := sorry
  exact ⟨n₀, fun n hn ↦ by obtain ⟨M, L, hLp, hL, h_score⟩ := hn₀ n hn; exact ⟨⟨n, M, L, hLp, hL⟩, rfl, h_score⟩⟩

obtain ⟨M, hM, hM_eps⟩ : ∃ M : ℕ, 0 < M ∧ log (1 - 1 / (M : ℝ))⁻¹ < ε / 3 := sorry

  filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop (L * L)] with n hn
  exact ⟨⟨n, M, L, hL, hn⟩, rfl, sorry⟩
sorry

set M := ⌈10 / ε⌉₊
  set L := M ^ 2
  have hM : 0 < M := by positivity
  have hL : 0 < L := by positivity
  filter_upwards [Filter.eventually_ge_atTop (L ^ 2 + 1),
    Filter.eventually_ge_atTop (⌊(10 / ε) ^ 2⌋₊)] with n hn hn'
  set P : Params := ⟨n, M, L, hL, by nlinarith⟩
  refine ⟨P, rfl, ?_⟩
  unfold Factorization.score
  have h_waste : P.initial.waste ≤ ε / 4 * n := by
    calc P.initial.waste
      _ ≤ n * Real.log (1 - 1 / M)⁻¹ := P.initial.waste
      _ ≤ n * (2 / M) := by sorry
      _ ≤ ε / 4 * n := by sorry
  have h_sum : ∑ p ∈ (n + 1).primesBelow,
      (if P.initial.balance p > 0 then (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) * Real.log p
       else if p ≤ L then (-P.initial.balance p) * Real.log L
       else (-P.initial.balance p) * Real.log (n / p)) ≤ 3 * ε / 4 * n := by
    sorry
  linarith [P.initial.waste, h_sum]

obtain ⟨M, hM, hMe⟩ : ∃ M : ℕ, 0 < M ∧ Real.log (1 - 1 / M : ℝ)⁻¹ < ε / 2 := by
    have h : Tendsto (fun M : ℝ ↦ Real.log (1 - 1 / M)⁻¹) atTop (𝓝 0) := (Real.tendsto_log (by norm_num)).comp
      (tendsto_inv_nhds_one.comp (tendsto_const_nhds.sub (tendsto_const_nhds.div_atTop tendsto_id)))
    exact ((h.comp tendsto_nat_cast_atTop_atTop).eventually (lt_mem_nhds (half_pos hε))).and (atTop_high 0) |>.exists
  let L := M ^ 2; have hL : 0 < L := pow_pos hM 2
  filter_upwards [atTop_high (L * L + 1), Real.tendsto_log_div_id_atTop.eventually (lt_mem_nhds (by positivity : 0 < ε / 4))] with n hn hlog
  let P : Params := ⟨n, M, L, hL, by omega⟩; use P, rfl
  unfold Factorization.score; nlinarith [P.initial.waste, hMe, hlog]

let M := ⌈4 / ε⌉₊; let L := M ^ 2
  filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop (L * L)] with n hn
  let P : Params := ⟨n, M, L, by positivity, hn⟩
  refine ⟨P, rfl, ?_⟩
  unfold Factorization.score
  -- The bound follows from the initial waste and balance lemmas for M, L large enough,
  -- and by applying the prime number theorem as n → ∞.
  sorry
